name: Bijou CSS (BCSS) & Live Styles

userStory.iWant: to style my application using familiar CSS selectors and separate stylesheets
userStory.soThat: my UI structure remains clean and I can hot-reload styles instantly.

acceptanceCriteria: CSS Parser correctly maps a subset of CSS properties to Bijou component props
Selectors support classes (.sidebar), IDs (#header), and widget types (Badge)
Pseudo-classes like :hover and :focus are supported via EventBus integration
Media queries (@media) handle responsive layout based on terminal rows/cols
Live hot-reloading works when CSS files are modified on disk

inScope: BCSS subset of CSS (Box Model, Flex/Grid, Typography)
outScope: Full CSS compatibility (no floating, no absolute positioning outside grid)
Web browser CSS (this is for terminal primitives only)

testPlan.goldenPath: Apply a .tcss file with .header { color: #ff0000; } to a component. Assert the component's resolved color is #ff0000.
edgeCases: Specificity wars between ID, class, and type selectors
Invalid CSS syntax handling (fail gracefully, log error)
Rapidly changing media query conditions (resizing terminal fast)
testPlan.fuzzStress: Apply a stylesheet with 10,000 rules and measure the time it takes to resolve a single widget's final style.
failureCases: Circular dependency in token references through CSS
Style resolution leaking between isolated sub-apps

estimatedComplexity.timeComplexity: O(N * M) where N is selectors and M is widget tree depth
